name: chatwoot
description: Reads Chatwoot Support conversations, contacts, inboxes, agents, teams, labels, and conversation-scoped messages, and writes contact/conversation/message/label mutations through the Chatwoot Application API.

risk.read: external Chatwoot Application API read of conversation, contact, and message data (account-scoped)
risk.write: external mutation of Chatwoot contacts, conversations, messages, and labels; agent-visible and customer-visible side effects
